title: Job Opening Category Manager at Droom Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Droom Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Droom Ventures Solutions family as a Category Manager in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Droom Ventures Solutions:
Droom Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom Ventures Solutions!
